scripts.predev: [ -f src/web/.dev.vars ] || (cp src/web/.dev.vars.example src/web/.dev.vars && sed -i '' "s|^BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=$|BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=$(openssl rand -base64 32)|" src/web/.dev.vars && sed -i '' "s|^ENCRYPTION_KEY=$|ENCRYPTION_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 32)|" src/web/.dev.vars && echo '✓ Generated src/web/.dev.vars (fill in OAuth keys if needed)'); [ -f src/email-worker/.dev.vars ] || (cp src/email-worker/.dev.vars.example src/email-worker/.dev.vars && KEY=$(grep '^ENCRYPTION_KEY=' src/web/.dev.vars | cut -d= -f2-) && sed -i '' "s|^ENCRYPTION_KEY=$|ENCRYPTION_KEY=$KEY|" src/email-worker/.dev.vars && echo '✓ Generated src/email-worker/.dev.vars (synced ENCRYPTION_KEY from web)')
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules src/*/node_modules src/*/dist src/*/.turbo .turbo src/web/.next src/web/.open-next src/*/.wrangler .alook
scripts.dev:send: node -e "const c=require('crypto');const a=process.argv.slice(1);const[f,t,s='Test',b='Hello from dev']=a;if(!f||!t){console.error('Usage: pnpm dev:send <from> <to> [subject] [body]');process.exit(1)}const raw=['From: '+f,'To: '+t,'Subject: '+s,'Message-ID: <'+c.randomUUID()+'@dev.local>','Date: '+new Date().toUTCString(),'MIME-Version: 1.0','Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8','',b].join('\r\n');fetch('http://localhost:8787/cdn-cgi/handler/email?from='+encodeURIComponent(f)+'&to='+encodeURIComponent(t),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:raw}).then(r=>{if(r.ok)console.log('Email delivered to worker');else return r.text().then(t=>{throw new Error(t)})}).catch(e=>console.error('Email worker not running?',e.message))"
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter @alook/web exec wrangler d1 migrations apply alook-app --local
scripts.deploy:web: pnpm db:migrate:remote && cd src/web && npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && npx opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.db:migrate:remote: pnpm --filter @alook/web exec wrangler d1 migrations apply alook-app --remote

simple-git-hooks.pre-commit: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test
